name: silent
description: The monster makes no sound.

name: bark
description: The monster barks, and may howl on a full moon.

name: mew
description: The monster mews or hisses.

name: roar
description: The monster roars.

name: growl
description: The monster growls.

name: squeak
description: The monster squeaks, as a rodent.

name: squawk
description: The monster squawks, as a bird.

name: hiss
description: The monster hisses.

name: buzz
description: The monster buzzes.

name: grunt
description: The monster grunts or speaks own language.

name: neigh
description: The monster neighs as an equine.

name: wail
description: The monster wails, as a tortured soul.

name: gurgle
description: The monster gurgles, as a liquid or through saliva.

name: burble
description: The monster burbles.

name: animal
description: The monster makes other animal noises.

name: shriek
description: The monster shrieks, waking up others.

name: bone-rattling
description: The monster rattles their bones.

name: laugh
description: The monster grins, smiles, giggles, and laughs.

name: mumble
description: The monster says something or mumbles.

name: imitate
description: The monster imitates others.

name: orc sounds
description: The monster makes orc-like sounds.

name: humanoid sounds
description: The monster makes humanoid-like sounds.

name: arrest
description: The monster makes arrest sounds.

name: soldier sounds
description: The monster makes army and watchmen sounds.

name: guard sounds
description: The monster makes guard sounds.

name: djinni sounds
description: The monster makes Djinni sounds.

name: nurse sounds
description: A monster that makes nurse sounds.

name: seduce
description: A monster that makes seduction sounds.

name: vampire sounds
description: The monster makes vampire sounds and seduction.

name: bribe
description: The monster bribes, berating or asking for money.

name: cussing
description: The monster cusses, as a demon or the Wizard.

name: rider
description: The monster makes astral level special monster sounds.

name: leader
description: The monster makes role leader sounds.

name: nemesis
description: The monster makes role nemesis sounds.

name: guardian
description: The monster makes role guardian sounds.

name: shopkeeper
description: The monster makes shopkeeper sounds.

name: oracle sounds
description: The monster makes consultation sounds.

name: priest sounds
description: The monster makes aligned priest sounds.

name: spellcaster
description: The monster makes spellcaster sounds apart from others.

name: lycanthrope
description: The monster makes lycanthrope sounds in human form.

name: boast
description: The monster boasts, as a giant.

name: fire resistance
description: The monster is resistant to fire.

name: cold resistance
description: The monster is resistant to cold.

name: sleep resistance
description: The monster is resistant to sleep.

name: disintegration resistance
description: The monster is resistant to disintegration.

name: shock resistance
description: The monster is resistant to shock.

name: poison resistance
description: The monster is resistant to poison.

name: acid resistance
description: The monster is resistant to acid.

name: stoning resistance
description: The monster is resistant to stoning.

name: hero see invisible
description: The hero can see invisible.

name: hero levitate
description: The hero is levitating.

name: hero water walk
description: The hero can walk on water.

name: hero magical breathing
description: The hero can breathe in any environment.

name: hero displacement
description: The hero has images of themselves, being displaced.

name: hero max strength
description: The hero has their strength set to 25, the highest possible value.

name: hero fumbling
description: The hero is clumsy and fumbles.

name: flying
description: The monster can fly.

name: swim
description: The monster can swim across water.

name: amorphous
description: The monster has no fixed shape or form.

name: phase
description: The monster can phase through solid tiles.

name: cling
description: The monster can cling to ceilings and hide.

name: tunnel
description: The monster can tunnel through rock, breaking solid tiles.

name: pickaxe tunnel
description: The monster can tunnel through rock only if they have a pickaxe.

name: conceal
description: The monster can hide under objects.

name: hide
description: The monster blends in with ceiling or mimics something.

name: amphibious
description: The monster can survive in land and water.

name: breathless
description: The monster deosn't need to breathe.

name: cannot pickup
description: The monster is unable to pick up objects.

name: no eyes
description: The monster has no eyes for gazing into or blinding themselves.

name: no hands
description: The monster has no hands to handle things.

name: no limbs
description: The monster has no limbs to kick or wear on.

name: no head
description: The monster has no head to behead.

name: no mind
description: The monster has no mind.

name: humanoid features
description: The monster has humanoid arms, torso, and a head.

name: animal body
description: The monster has an animal body.

name: slithy
description: The monster has a serpent body, having no legs.

name: unsolid
description: The monster has no solid body or has a liquid body.

name: thick hide
description: The monster has a thick hide or scales.

name: oviparous
description: The monster's female form can lay eggs.

name: regeneration
description: The monster can regenerate its hit points.

name: see invisible
description: The monster can see invisible.

name: teleport
description: The monster can teleport.

name: teleport control
description: The monster can control where it teleports to.

name: acidic
description: The monster is acidic to eat.

name: poisonous
description: The monster is poisonous to eat.

name: carnivore
description: The monster only eats corpses and meat.

name: herbivore
description: The monster only eats fruits and veggies.

name: omnivore
description: The monster can eat both meat and fruit.

name: metallivore
description: The monster only eats metal.

name: no polymorphing
description: The hero cannot polymorph to the monster.

name: undead
description: The monster is part of the walking dead.

name: lycanthrope
description: The monster is a lycanthrope.

name: human
description: The monster is a human.

name: elf
description: The monster is an elf.

name: dwarf
description: The monster is a dwarf.

name: gnome
description: The monster is a gnome.

name: orc
description: The monster is an orc.

name: demon
description: The monster is a demon.

name: mercenary
description: The monster is a guard or soldier.

name: lord
description: The monster is a lord to its kind.

name: overlord
description: The monster is an overlord to its kind.

name: minion
description: The monster is a minion of a deity.

name: giant
description: The monster is a giant.

name: shapeshifter
description: The monster is a shapeshifting species.

name: always male
description: The monster is always male.

name: always female
description: The monster is always female.

name: no sex
description: The monster is neither male or female.

name: proper
description: The monster has a proper name.

name: always hostile
description: The monster always starts hostile.

name: always peaceful
description: The monster always starts peaceful.

name: domestic
description: The monster can be tamed by feeding.

name: wanderer
description: The monster is restless and wanders aimlessly.

name: stalker
description: The monster can follow you to other levels.

name: nasty
description: The monster is a more harder monster, considered a nasty for more XP.

name: strong
description: The monster is especially strong and/or big.

name: throw boulder
description: The monster can throw boulders.

name: greedy
description: The monster really likes gold.

name: jeweler
description: The monster really likes gems.

name: pickup
description: The monster picks up weapons and food.

name: pickup magics
description: The monster picks up magic items.

name: amulet stealer
description: The monster would like to steal the Amulet.

name: bell stealer
description: The monster would like to steal the Bell.

name: book stealer
description: The monster would like to steal the Book.

name: candelabrum stealer
description: The monster would like to steal the Candelabrum.

name: quest artifact stealer
description: The monster would like to steal the quest artifact.

name: major artifacts stealer
description: The monster would like to steal any major artifact.

name: waits
description: The monster waits to see you or gets attacked.

name: close in
description: The monster waits for you to get close or gets attacked.

name: infravisible
description: The monster is infravisible to the hero.

name: tiny
description: The monster is less than two feet tall.

name: small
description: The monster is roughly two to four feet tall (e.g., a hobbit or gnome).

name: medium
description: The monster is human-sized, roughly four to seven feet tall.

name: human-sized
description: The monster is human-sized (alias for medium).

name: large
description: The monster is large, roughly seven to twelve feet tall.

name: huge
description: The monster is very large, roughly 12 to 25 feet tall.

name: gigantic
description: The monster is of massive, titanic proportions, over 25 feet tall.

name: unique
description: The monster is unique, meaning only one can exist at a time.

name: not in hell
description: This monster is never randomly generated in Gehennom.

name: only in hell
description: This monster is only randomly generated in Gehennom.

name: special generation
description: This monster is not generated randomly, appearing in specific spots.

name: small group
description: This monster usually appears in small groups.

name: large group
description: This monster usually appears in large groups.

name: genocidable
description: This monster species can be wiped out using a scroll of genocide.

name: no corpse
description: This monster never leaves a corpse when it dies.
